item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Dancer's Journey I-III
item.description:
A compilation of the first three volumes of the detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned dancer─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level dancer to 80 and complete all job quests up through “Rising to the Occasion.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
